metadata.description: STS AI Agent Strategy Weights - Ironclad Base

act_base_modifiers.description: 1막 전반에 걸쳐 기본적으로 적용되는 곱연산 가중치

Slime_Boss.llm_prompt: [CRITICAL] Your act boss is Slime Boss. High AOE damage and massive Turn 3 burst damage are absolute priorities. Do not pick slow scaling cards.

The_Guardian.llm_prompt: [CRITICAL] Your act boss is The Guardian. You need highly efficient Block cards and predictable damage to control its thorns mode.

Hexaghost.llm_prompt: [CRITICAL] Your act boss is Hexaghost. You need fast scaling or rapid burst before the Inferno attack.

Bronze_Automaton.llm_prompt: [CRITICAL] Your act boss is Bronze Automaton. You need a way to survive Hyperbeam and scale your damage quickly.

Collector.llm_prompt: [CRITICAL] Your act boss is The Collector. Consistent AOE to kill minions and high block are required.

Champ.llm_prompt: [CRITICAL] Your act boss is The Champ. You must have extreme scaling and burst damage to kill him after he cleanses debuffs at 50% HP.
